summary: The implementation translates the 5 group `name` labels in components/StrategicSignals.tsx (Product Launches, Partnerships, AI Initiatives, IAM/Governance, SecOps/Platform) to Russian, exactly matching the approved plan. Icons, data bindings, and the already-translated section heading are untouched. The `name` still serves as the unique React key and values remain unique. Only the single intended file was modified, no logic or type changes. Typecheck and build both pass. Requirements fully satisfied with very low risk.
